---
title: "Simple_Simulation"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-28"
---
# Set seed
```{r}

set.seed(100)

```

# Parameters
```{r}

n <- 50 

mu_initial <- 0 

variance <- 1

sigma <- sqrt(variance)

```

# Number of Simulations
```{r}

nsim <- 1000

```

# Store results
```{r}

contains_mu <- logical(nsim)

for (i in 1:nsim) {
  
  # Generate data from N(mu_initial, variance)
  x <- rnorm(n, mean = mu_initial, sd = sigma)
  
  # Sample mean and SD
  xbar <- mean(x)
  s <- sd(x)
  
  # 95% confidence interval 
  margin_error <- qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * s / sqrt(n)
  
  ci_lower <- xbar - margin_error 
  ci_upper <- xbar + margin_error
  
  # Check if true mean is inside the CI
  contains_mu[i] <- (mu_initial >= ci_lower) & (mu_intial <= ci_upper)
}

# Contain probability 
coverage_rate <- mean(contains_mu)

print(coverage_rate)

```
